sessions.title: Adapt across devices with Flutter
sessions.description: Scale personalized, generative experiences across platforms. Check out how Very Good Ventures uses Flutter’s GenUI to deliver interfaces that adapt to the user, their needs, and their devices.

sessions.title: ADK & A2A in Action
sessions.description: Orchestrate a studio swarm via ADK. Witness the A2A protocol drive real-time consensus as agents autonomously negotiate budget, pivot on trends, and align design constraints to ship a complete game pitch in 5 minutes.

sessions.title: Agent Challenge
sessions.description: Team up with agents, connect them across platforms, and solve missions with Gemini Enterprise. Track real-time insights, explore industry-specific demos, and go hands-on with Agent Designer to see how connecting your entire enterprise stack automates complex workflows and unlocks new levels of productivity.

sessions.title: Agentic forecasting and planning
sessions.description: Experience the future of energy management where Agentic AI moves beyond simple prediction to proactive grid optimization. This demo showcases how a unified platform can revolutionize grid planning and operations by integrating world-class geospatial data and advanced atmospheric modeling.

sessions.title: AI Photo Booth
sessions.description:
Discover the speed and accuracy of our latest media models. Nano Banana 2, our Gemini Image model, preserves your features with precision and Veo 3+ creates a cinematic world around you.

Scan the QR code to download your creation, and see how Google AI can help you bring your vision to life.

sessions.title: AI training and inference
sessions.description: Accelerate AI training and workloads with Google Cloud Managed Lustre, a high-performance, parallel file system delivering high performance throughput.

sessions.title: AI-ready compute
sessions.description: Deliver industry-leading price-performance for general-purpose and specialized workloads with Google Axion processors, leveraging Titanium to offload I/O processing.

sessions.title: Ask an Expert
sessions.description: Direct access to Google Cloud Consulting’s top minds. Bring your complex technical blockers or strategic questions. We’ll help unblock your roadmap so you leave with more than just advice—you leave with a plan.

sessions.title: Automate your workflow with Gemini CLI
sessions.description: Unlock automation for CI/CD pipelines. Learn how to use headless mode to automate triage processes, analyze logs, and trigger fixes without human intervention—transforming your terminal into an autonomous operations agent.

sessions.title: Autonomous network operations framework
sessions.description: Experience a production-ready AIOps solution that leverages Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) for Level 4 network assurance. This demo highlights the shift to predictive, topology-aware operations through real-time mapping of multi-vendor infrastructure. Watch as GNNs isolate symptomatic alarms to cut noise and MTTI by 90%, while graph embeddings proactively predict capacity crunches weeks in advance. Discover how netai.ai deploys GraphML at commercial scale, transforming operations for global operators.

sessions.title: Beyond the basics in Gemini CLI
sessions.description: Chat with us about what's new and what's next for Gemini CLI! Get hands-on demos of new capabilities and see how Gemini CLI can transform your terminal experience and beyond.

sessions.title: Branch of the future
sessions.description: The branch of the future uses intelligent location tracking and biometric recognition to help create a streamlined, personalized experience from the moment a customer arrives. By empowering staff with real-time insights and automated follow-ups, the branch helps make interactions efficient, accessible, and highly tailored to the individual’s needs.

sessions.title: Bridge language gaps with AI
sessions.description: Experience how real-time speech translation in Google Meet dissolves language barriers. Enter a private booth and engage in a multilingual conversation where tools built with Google Cloud AI translate your words while preserving your unique voice and tone—making global collaboration feel natural and inclusive.

sessions.title: Build a cloud-native game with Antigravity
sessions.description: Witness the future of software development as Antigravity builds a Match-3 game with just natural language. See how it plans, codes, and deploys to deliver a polished application—all without writing a single line of code manually.

sessions.title: Build a multicloud open data lakehouse
sessions.description: Build your Apache Iceberg lakehouse with multicloud data access and governance. Automate cataloging and pipelines with AI agents. Accelerate Apache Spark with Lightning Engine and integrate with AI agents.

sessions.title: Build agents with Vertex AI
sessions.description: Start your agentic journey with the Agent Development Kit (ADK) and Agent Designer. Learn to build production-ready agents using a unified framework that connects to your tools and data right out of the box.

sessions.title: Build rich agent experiences with ADK + A2UI
sessions.description: Build an ADK agent that renders rich, interactive UI - forms, charts, and live widgets - directly in a web app using A2UI's streaming protocol. Ship a working agent-powered frontend in minutes.

sessions.title: Building secure agents: protecting access and data
sessions.description: Build a secure chain of trust for your AI. Learn how to sanitize inputs and agent interactions with Model Armor, enforce least-privilege with Agent Identity, and audit the entire execution path to get your agents safely into production.

sessions.title: Chat with your data using Gemini
sessions.description: Experience the era of Agentic BI: Use Vibe coding in Looker to model BigQuery and AlloyDB data, blend spreadsheets on the fly, and get trusted answers instantly with Conversational Analytics.

sessions.title: CLI Mission Control
sessions.description: Code, command, launch! Use Gemini CLI to complete the launch sequence steps and watch your rocket take off as you compete for a place on the leaderboard.

sessions.title: Commercial underwriting made easy with Gemini
sessions.description: Experience a highly optimized commercial underwriting workflow powered by enterprise AI. This solution automates document ingestion, regulatory auditing, and initial risk triage at scale. Integrated Gemini assistants empower underwriters to query historical claims data and extract precise guidelines from complex manuals, accelerating the quote-to-bind process and driving superior risk selection.

sessions.title: Connect ADK agents to any tool with MCP
sessions.description: Equip your ADK agent with powerful external tools. Connect to MCP servers for code, databases, memory, and more - with a few lines of code using MCP toolset, then watch your agent integrate with your systems and take action.

sessions.title: Connect ADK agents to Gemini Enterprise
sessions.description: Build, manage, and govern AI agents across the organization. Use Gemini Enterprise as the front door for AI tools in the workplace, and ADK to empower employees with sophisticated agents tailored to their roles.

sessions.title: Control a Vestaboard with Gemini CLI and MCP
sessions.description: Take your prompts beyond the screen. Check out what happens when you connect Gemini CLI with a custom Model Context Protocol server on Google Cloud to control a physical Vestaboard in real time.

sessions.title: Create and refine a deliverable
sessions.description: Create and refine deliverables with unprecedented speed and customization using the latest features in Google Docs and Slides.

sessions.title: Create videos with AI
sessions.description: Sit in the director’s chair and unleash your creativity with Google Vids. Immerse yourself in our mixing studio where you can produce stunning visual scenes with custom soundtracks—starting with just a selfie or group photo. Discover how the tool allows anyone to quickly create engaging videos with AI.

sessions.title: Customize Antigravity for your organization
sessions.description: Ship features to an enterprise app with zero coding. Learn how to set the rules so Antigravity can handle the execution, ensuring every feature is compliant and production-ready from day one.

sessions.title: Delegate tasks to subagents in Gemini CLI
sessions.description: Assign the right agent to the task with specialized subagents in Gemini CLI. Learn how these agents save tokens and get the job done faster and more efficiently.

sessions.title: Deploy and scale agents on Agent Engine
sessions.description: Deploy your ADK agent to production in minutes. Launch on Vertex AI Agent Engine with managed hosting, wire up persistent memory via Memory Bank, run code securely, and trace every agent decision with built-in observability.

sessions.title: Develop a plan or strategy
sessions.description: Define goals, outline steps, and anticipate challenges when direction isn’t yet clear - turning uncertainty into a shared plan of action with Gemini Enterprise.

sessions.title: Empowering markets: real-time data & client intelligence
sessions.description: This capital markets demo showcases an intelligent ecosystem where real-time market data and client intelligence converge to empower exchanges, institutional advisors, and traders.

sessions.title: Enable one-tap phone verification with Firebase
sessions.description: Secure mobile authentication without the friction. Verify users over cellular or Wi-Fi without the hassle of SMS or manual codes – a single tap is all it takes.

sessions.title: Enterprise workloads for regulated environments
sessions.description: Run mission-critical enterprise apps where you need them. See how to modernize legacy enterprise workloads in strictly regulated environments while ensuring total compliance, security, and operational agility.

sessions.title: Execute a project and drive an outcome
sessions.description: Rely on Google Workspace with Gemini to track progress, surface blockers, and keep teams aligned - turning plans into measurable results.

sessions.title: Explore the Gemini CLI extensions ecosystem
sessions.description: Get live demos of extensions from across the Gemini CLI ecosystem, presented by the experts themselves. See how to use Gemini CLI with your favorite tools and data sources, reducing context switching and keeping you in the flow.

sessions.title: Extend Gemini CLI's power with Google-built extensions
sessions.description:
Discover the power of official Google-built Gemini CLI Extensions. This booth will showcase a Google-built Gemini CLI Extension each day.
Day 1: Google Workspace
Day 2: Conductor
Day 3: Chrome DevTools

sessions.title: Fast track life science breakthroughs with AI driven tools
sessions.description: Experience the future of clinical research. This demo showcases how specialized AI agents drive value at every stage by automating complex tasks and minimizing bottlenecks. See how secure, multimodal AI empowers you to reduce timelines and bring life-saving therapies to market faster.

sessions.title: Fast-track apps to the cloud
sessions.description: Learn how to use Gemini Cloud Assist with Application Design Center to create infrastructure design of your application, and deploy and operate it efficiently.

sessions.title: Find and synthesize information
sessions.description: Analyze and synthesize Drive files with Gemini and NotebookLM. Turn scattered information into actionable insights to drive decisions, and transform documents into shared knowledge, like onboarding guides, instantly.

sessions.title: Gain unified insights into your applications
sessions.description: Learn how to deploy Google’s platform-level capabilities to solve data silo problems and give your SREs a break. Use a graph-based approach to map out application dependencies, grabbing insights across your entire stack.

sessions.title: Gaming assistant with Gemini Live API
sessions.description: Don't drop the controller when you get stuck on that level. Instead call on Gemini Live API with its' multimodal understanding to give you game specific guidence that keeps you in the zone.

sessions.title: Gemini driven manufacturing intelligence hub
sessions.description: Unlock the potential of your production floor with Gemini-powered AI agents. This demo showcases how to centralize tribal knowledge and standard operating procedures into an accessible hub, enabling workers to find answers instantly via text, voice, or images. Experience specialized AI agents—like the Operations and Maintenance agents—providing real-time troubleshooting, step-by-step guidance, and predictive insights to reduce downtime, accelerate onboarding, and drive continuous improvement across your manufacturing operations.

sessions.title: Gemini Enterprise for Customer Experience: Redefining CSP cost structures
sessions.description: Google Cloud introduces Gemini Enterprise for Customer Experience, a Tier-1 ready platform designed to redefine the CSP cost structure. By deploying native audio-to-audio models, we move beyond basic chatbots to high-fidelity, multimodal interactions that mirror human nuance. This session demonstrates how our enterprise-grade architecture accelerates deployment for care and sales. Watch us build a live use case in real-time, proving how you can rapidly transition from legacy IVR to high-conversion, GenAI-native conversational experiences

sessions.title: Gemini Enterprise: The agentic core for supply chain orchestration
sessions.description: Transform your supply chain operations with enterprise AI. This demo showcases how to break down data silos by grounding advanced Gemini models in your company's real-time ERP and SCM data. Experience a taskforce of specialized agents that automate complex workflows—from tracking shipments and detecting anomalies to optimizing fleet routes and simulating inventory scenarios. Empower every employee with no-code tools to turn tribal knowledge into scalable AI, reducing busy work and accelerating strategic decision-making across the entire value chain.

sessions.title: Gemini Robotics
sessions.description: Brought to you by Google DeepMind, discover how the latest Gemini Robotics models are pushing the frontier of intelligent agents that think and act across contexts.

sessions.title: Generative media for marketing & advertising
sessions.description: Discover how Google Cloud AI’s generative media capabilities transform marketing workflows into high-velocity growth engines. Explore hands-on demos that showcase how tools built on Vertex AI enable advanced content creation and editing, while maintaining strict brand compliance and enterprise-grade safety. The result is better content that gets to market faster, enabling a sophisticated creative pipeline that delivers high-impact results for your business.

sessions.title: GenLatte
sessions.description: Your coffee order, personalized by Google AI. Use an application powered by Firebase and Flutter's Generative UI to customize your coffee and design custom latte art based on your vision, or—if you're feeling adventurous—try using Antigravity's agentic coding experience to quickly build your own version of the app and use it place an order instead!

sessions.title: Google Cloud x Mars
sessions.description: Experience the future of candy creation at the Mars AI Snack Factory. Dream up your own confection recipe using Gemini Enterprise and see how Mars uses Google Cloud to improve its product workflows from concept to shelf.

sessions.title: Immersive training with Live Avatar
sessions.description: Elevate training materials for your organization with immersive Live Avatars that engage in thoughtful discussions and can simulate realistic scenarios for you and your teamates to practice.

sessions.title: Learn the basics of Gemini CLI
sessions.description: Get started with Gemini CLI. Explore built-in commands and learn how to personalize your environment so that you can supercharge your daily workflow.

sessions.title: Mission Talk: Agentic AI for Infrastructure Planning: Plans to Progress
sessions.description:
Our geospatial agentic AI platform, Infrastructure Insights Pro (IIP), streamlines and automates infrastructure planning by accounting for interdependencies across complex multi-dimensional data from transportation, land-use, demographics, and weather. IIP helps planners answer critical questions: “what is” (situational awareness), “what next” (predictions), and “what if” (simulations).



Speaker:
Emma Pattiz, Manager, Deloitte

sessions.title: Mission Talk: Agentic application for real world decision support (Months to Hours)
sessions.description:
Accelerate economic development with Deloitte's agentic AI for actionable reviews of complex permits with text, maps and drawings against regulation and requirements to proactively flag compliance and technical deficiencies and recommend precise actions. Cut reviews from months to hours!



Speaker:
Rafi Lav, Specialist Leader, Deloitte

sessions.title: Mission Talk: Deploying AI Agents to Resolve the Fact-Finding Bottleneck
sessions.description:
Novatio merges Labor workflows with Generative AI. While adjudicators follow up on vague job separation information, backlogs grow. Replacing static questions with dynamic AI interviews captures details correctly the first time, generating AI comparisons and relevant law for faster decisions.



Speaker:
Julie Primo, Public Sector Industry Lead, Novatio Solutions

sessions.title: Mission Talk: Everyone Goes Home Tonight - Work Zone Safety with AI
sessions.description:
With over 40,000 injuries and fatalities annually, work zones crews face immense daily risk. ClearObject’s Work Zone Vision AI solution has real-time safety alerts and functions as a powerful data collection tool with Agentic AI analysis to inform future policy and strategically allocate resources.



Speaker:
Derek Bleyle, VP, Product & Operations, ClearObject

sessions.title: Mission Talk: Gemini Enterprise: Automating Public Sector Citizen Experience
sessions.description:
For state and local government contact center leaders and caseworkers facing overwhelming inquiry volumes, this demo showcases how Gemini Enterprise for Customer Experience acts as an autonomous frontline agent capable of immediate, intuitive, and multilingual resolution.



Speaker:
Roberto Coyotl, Principal Architect, Egen

sessions.title: Mission Talk: Genimi-Powered MeF: Accelerating State Tax Compliance
sessions.description:
Our GenAI solution digitally transforms Modernized e-File (MeF) XML schema generation for State Departments of Revenue, enabling rapid, accurate tax compliance and optimizing vendor testing for tax administrators.



Speakers:
Kunal, Thakkar, Enterprise Partnership Sales Executive, Resultant
Hang Dao, Enterprise Partnership Sales Executive, Colorado Department of Revenue

sessions.title: Mission Talk: Mission-First Security - Executing CJIS Policy at Google Speed
sessions.description:
Insight turns complex public safety policy (Texas DIR/CJIS) into a mission-ready execution engine with Google Cloud SecOps. We demonstrate AI-driven threat detection, automated response (SOAR) for quick containment, and instant, evidence-based compliance reporting for public safety agencies.



Speaker:
Simon Margolis, Associate CTO & Distinguished Technologist

sessions.title: Mission Talk: Scaling Secure GenAI with GAILFORCE: Data Silos to Insights
sessions.description:
GAILFORCE gives the Department of War and other US Government mission specialists a decisive edge by using Gemini and Vertex AI to autonomously navigate internal and external data silos. It proactively identifies and summarizes critical events into interactive and relevant SITREPs, allowing agency personnel to interrogate complex datasets for faster, secure mission execution.



Speakers:
Adam Lurie, Cheif Executive Officer, Knexus Research
Martina Johnson, Deputy Director, DLA Research and Development, DLA

sessions.title: Mission Talk: Seamless Self-Service with Google AI
sessions.description:
Transform State and Local government with TTEC Digital’s AI agent. Powered by Google CES, this solution autonomously validates pothole reports, processes citizen-uploaded photos, and generates service requests in real-time to slash agent workload and accelerate infrastructure repairs.



Speakers:
Mark Eichten, Global AI Architect Lead, TTEC Digital
Kelly Jacob, VP - Public Sector Sales, TTEC Digital

sessions.title: Modernizing legacy code with Antigravity
sessions.description: Watch as Antigravity extracts a mortgage calculator from a legacy Python monolith and rebuilds it as a Material 3 Angular microservice. It manages the entire mission from end to end, delivering precise, verifiable results.

sessions.title: Next in Financial Services
sessions.description: Discover a new way to look at your financial health: Use generative media to break down complex financial products into something that actually makes sense, turning financial data into a visual experience.

sessions.title: Next in Media
sessions.description: Want to be part of a Hollywood crew? Come take on a key role in the media generation process to create a short film from scratch, featuring stunning visuals, custom audio, and smooth transitions.

sessions.title: Next in Retail
sessions.description: Your trip, fully packed. Instantly generate shoppable, weather-ready packing lists tailored to your destination with context-aware AI. You can even try things on virtually with Nano Banana.

sessions.title: Orchestrate multi-agent systems with the A2A protocol
sessions.description: Assemble a team of specialist agents and watch them collaborate. Build a multi-agent system with ADK where agents discover each other via agent cards, delegate tasks, and stream results - all through the A2A protocol.

sessions.title: Physical AI
sessions.description: Discover how Physical AI models, massive-scale reinforcement learning, and edge computing can bridge the gap between digital simulation and real-world action to drive full industrial automation and process optimization.

sessions.title: Reimagine NPCs with Google AI
sessions.description: Google Cloud provides a transformative solution for game developers to deliver dynamic, personalized in-game experiences through intelligent, real-time Non-Player Characters (NPCs). Utilizing Google’s advanced AI and machine learning tools, including generative AI for games, the solution provides the technology and infrastructure to create innovative features that captivate and retain players.

sessions.title: Scale reinforcement learning with high-performance storage
sessions.description: Optimize large-scale training on Google Cloud. Compare Managed Lustre and Cloud Storage FUSE, and discover how high-speed storage prevents slowdowns when dealing with large amounts of data at once.

sessions.title: Secure agent commerce with AP2 and UCP
sessions.description: Orchestrate a secure multi-agent payment flow end-to-end. Enable shopping, merchant, and payment processor agents to coordinate transactions using AP2 and UCP - with mandate signing and credential governance built in.

sessions.title: Secure AI agents with multicloud networks
sessions.description: Securely connect your AI agents and model endpoints from anywhere with a high performance Cross-Cloud Network designed to keep your agentic workflows optimized and safe.

sessions.title: Secure AI-first work
sessions.description: Learn how Chrome Enterprise and Google Workspace keep users safe and help prevent the loss of sensitive company information without disrupting how the work gets done in the AI-first era.

sessions.title: Sentient Screen: Iterative video with Gemini & Veo
sessions.description:
See how Google Cloud AI reimagines physical venues by transforming static screens into responsive, intelligent interfaces.
Explore how Gemini turns real-time audience data and insights into precise creative prompts.
Watch as Google’s Veo model responds by generating high-fidelity, context-aware video on the fly.
This closed-loop system ensures your digital displays adapt to the people standing right in front of them, creating a truly responsive and intelligent environment.

sessions.title: Ship multi-agent systems on Cloud Run
sessions.description: Build your own team of autonomous AI agents that solve complex problems, leveraging GPU support for high-performance inference, open LLM deployment, agentic design patterns, and scalable frontends.

sessions.title: Stay ahead of modern cyber threats with Mandiant
sessions.description: Seize the Defender’s Advantage. From the critical moments of an incident response to building long-term resilience, Mandiant expertise helps you close security gaps and stay ahead of the evolving threat landscape.

sessions.title: Supercharge data science with Gemini and BigQuery
sessions.description: Discover how Gemini boosts data science productivity. See Antigravity generate intelligent plans and code, incorporate multimodal data, and run machine learning workflows at BigQuery scale.

sessions.title: Take action and deliver faster results
sessions.description: Effectively identify, prioritize, and execute critical tasks with the help of Google Workspace with Gemini.

sessions.title: The latest Claude models on Vertex AI
sessions.description: Build persistent agents with Claude on Vertex AI. Harness a 1M context window, web search, and memory while enjoying day-of-launch access to every new Anthropic model with Vertex AI.

sessions.title: Turn a physical card into a code fix with Jules
sessions.description: Kick off a fully autonomous code-maintenance cycle with just a card. From planning and logic to implementation, Jules handles the technical debt so you can stay focused on the next feature.

sessions.title: Understand your codebase instantly with Code Wiki
sessions.description: Leave stale docs in the past. Code Wiki generates living documentation that evolves alongside your codebase. Search your repository directly to get accurate, linked answers, helping you master any corner of your code in seconds.
